headline: 3M health care spinoff Solventum officially opens Eagan Innovation Hub
summary: 3M’s new health care spinoff, Solventum, opened the doors to its $200 million Innovation Hub on Wednesday morning in Eagan. A ribbon-cutting ceremony was held to commemorate the event, with addresses by company officers and local officials celebrating the company’s decision to invest in Minnesota rather than another state. “It was a very deliberate decision for us to make the investment in ...
